base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_7_draculas_keep_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Level 7 Dracula's Keep — short final-boss-room stage. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 7 Dracula's Keep — short final-boss-room stage; single-screen-plus-corridor leading to Dracula Phase 1 + Phase 2 fight arena. Shortest level (770 px wide)
